Austin Time (CDT)

Wedding Day Timeline

Faryal & Zaheer

Photography Coverage Schedule
Logistics
Bride
Groom
Ceremony
Reception
Critical
Arrival & Setup
1:30 PM
Head out to venue
1:45 PM
Arrive at venue
2:30 PM
Begin coverage
Bride — Getting Ready
3:00 PM
Faryal is dressed
3:10 PM
Mohur delivered PRIVATE MOMENT
Gift from groom — delivered by Zaheer's parents
Faryal must be completely alone when she opens it
3:20 PM
Nikkah permission moment
Witnesses, Imam, and Parents enter to ask Faryal for her permission
3:30–4:30
Faryal family pictures PHOTO BLOCK
Groom — Getting Ready
3:30 PM
Capture Zaheer getting ready
4:00 PM
Zaheer dressed
4:00–4:45
Zaheer family pictures PHOTO BLOCK
Nikkah Ceremony
~5:00 PM
"Official Start" SOFT TIME
Faryal's guests seated in amphitheater. Zaheer's guests gather in lobby. Faryal's parents driven to amphitheater.
5:15 PM
Zaheer Bharat begins
Tassa leads the way from Riversong Lawn
~5:45 PM
Zaheer arrives at amphitheater
Faryal's parents welcome Zaheer's parents
~5:50 PM
Faryal & Freya driven to amphitheater
Driven by Gina
Ceremony order:
• Short welcome + please silence phones
• Music plays — ring bearer and flower girl enter
• Ask everyone to rise for the bride
• Music plays — bride enters 59 seconds after song starts
• Welcome / officiant introduction
• Explanation of the Nikkah ceremony
• Opening Dua — Faryal's uncle Noman Kazmi
• Surah Ar-rum 30:20–22 — read by Noman Kazmi
• English summary of Surah Ar-rum & Khutba
  (love, family, togetherness, responsibilities in marriage)
• Nikkah Ceremony — ask bride three times
• Ring exchange (groom first) + garland exchange
• Arsi Mushaf explanation & ceremony
  "Newlyweds see each other's faces for the first time under the light of marriage. In the mirror, they see their future — the two of them facing the rest of the world."
• Closing Dua
• Ask couple to stand — pronounce them husband and wife
• Music plays — bride and groom exit
Exit
⚠ Photographer boards golf cart immediately
Get in the golf cart with the couple — driven away at the top of the stairs
Reception
6:45 PM
Guests walk to ballroom
Doors open — food served immediately. Couple does Indian clothes pictures.
7:15 PM
Zaheer & Faryal eat and change clothes
7:45–8:30
Western clothes pictures PHOTO BLOCK
~8:00 PM
Last call for food
8:15 PM
Food service ends
Agas removes tables. Hotel staff sets dessert boxes and cake on serpentine tables.
~8:25 PM
Ask guests to take seats — MC introduces himself
~8:30 PM
Grand Entrances
  • Siblings & Nephews: Billal, Hafeeza, Noor, Farah, Josh, Romeo, Ejaz, Zayd
  • Faryal's Parents: Syed Sajjad Zafar and Nusrat Fatima
  • Zaheer's Parents: Naeem and Sally Kamal
  • Couple: Mr. and Mrs. Zaheer and Faryal Kamal
8:40 PM
First Dance
8:45 PM
Siblings' speeches
  • 1. Hafeeza Kamal
  • 2. Billal Haider
  • 3. Farah Gill
9:00 PM
Parents' speeches
  • 1. Syed Sajjad Zafar and Nusrat Fatima
  • 2. Naeem and Sally Kamal
9:10 PM
Zaheer & Faryal speech
9:15 PM
Group selfie + Dance floor opens
Invite everyone to dancefloor for a selfie — DJ starts immediately after
10:30 PM
End of coverage
Faryal & Zaheer · Wedding Day Timeline · Photography Reference
